description: Two colored territory zones with an animated contested front line. Best for conflict coverage — war zones, disputed borders, occupied territories, political divisions.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'UKRAINE FRONT LINES' or 'CONTESTED TERRITORY'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Summary sentence, e.g. 'As of March 2025, approximately 20% of Ukrainian territory remains occupied'
fields.STAT_VALUE_1: Key stat for side 1, e.g. '80%' or '42,000 km²'
fields.LABEL_1: Stat label for side 1, e.g. 'TERRITORY HELD' or 'CONTROLLED AREA'
fields.STAT_VALUE_2: Key stat for side 2, e.g. '20%' or '12,000 km²'
